title: calycomelia ovata
intro: Calycomelia ovata, also known as Mexican tea or yerba de la luna, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Calycomelia ovata include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Calycomelia ovata can be prepared in various ways, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
